caption: A man with a beard and a black baseball cap sits in front of a computer monitor, positioned on the right side of the screen. He wears a black t-shirt and sits in a black gaming chair. To the left, a web browser displays the "List Randomizer" page from RANDOM.ORG, which includes a text box for entering a list. The man is partially visible in a small overlay window, and the bottom of the screen features a red and yellow banner for "CASEBREAKS.COM". As the sequence progresses, the "List Randomizer" interface changes; the text box is initially empty, but eventually, a numbered list from 1 to 10 is generated. The final screen shows the results of the randomization, stating, "There were 10 items in your list. Here they are in random order:" followed by a shuffled list of numbers. The text "RANDOM.ORG" and "True Random Number Service" are prominently displayed.
